title: Personalized chatbots for inmates
abstract: A communication system for providing a positive communication to an inmate is provided. The communication system includes memory that stores data, and an application server that that analyzes that data to determine topics that are important to the inmate. The application server includes a topic rating system to rate the topics based on importance to the inmate and based on an emotional tone used by the inmate during a communication. When the application server receives a question from the inmate, the application server searches the data and the Internet and responds based on the answer and the data stored in memory. The application server also provides support to the inmate by suggesting counseling services according to the needs of the inmate. Further, the communication system provides a positive influence to the inmate to encourage educational progression.
claims: 1. A method for allowing an inmate to communicate with a chatbot in a correctional facility, the method comprising: presenting a graphical user interface to the inmate using a communication device for sending and receiving chat communication from the chatbot; storing inmate data and chatbot data in a memory of a communication subsystem, wherein the inmate data includes inmate's background, schedule, and personal information obtained from the correctional facility and the chatbot data includes an appearance, a voice, and a personality of the chatbot; analyzing the inmate data using an application server; extracting a topic important to the inmate based on the analyzing; generating a communication of the chatbot based on the extracted topic and the chatbot data; and converting and storing incoming and outgoing chat communications in the memory of the communication subsystem using a communication server; performing a keyword search of the chat communication using the communication server; determining to alert a monitoring center of improper use of the chatbot by the inmate based on the keyword search; and suspending the incoming and outgoing chat communications between the chatbot and the communication device based on the monitoring.
